headline: Prime Video Plots 'Reacher' Universe Expansion with Neagley Spin-off
lede: Amazon's expanding its muscular crime franchise with a targeted spin-off focusing on fan-favorite character Jane Neagley. The new series promises a distinctive narrative approach separate from the main Jack Reacher storyline.
body:
Prime Video is doubling down on its successful Jack Reacher adaptation, greenlighting a dedicated series centered on the enigmatic supporting character Jane Neagley. Actress Adeline Rudolph will headline the project, which promises to carve out a unique narrative space within the burgeoning Reacher universe.

Sources close to the production indicate the spin-off will explore Neagley's complex backstory and operational tactics, leveraging the character's popularity from the original series. Rudolph, known for her intense dramatic range, brings significant credibility to the potential series.

The strategic expansion reflects Prime Video's commitment to building out franchise properties with targeted, character-driven narratives. By focusing on Neagley, the streamer can potentially explore more nuanced storytelling beyond the primary Jack Reacher procedural framework.

While specific plot details remain closely guarded, industry observers suggest the series will likely maintain the gritty, action-oriented tone established by Alan Ritchson's original interpretation. Rudolph's involvement signals a serious commitment to character development and narrative depth.
key_facts: Spin-off centered on Jane Neagley character
